intro: Walsholaria calcarea, also known as Indian plantain, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues.
